message:
feat(ui): add 'e' and 'c' keyboard shortcuts for tool expand/collapse all

Wire up 'e' to ToolExpandAll and 'c' to ToolCollapseAll in the detail
modal focus trap, enabling rapid bulk expansion and collapse of tool and
system messages. Also forward the three tool-collapse message variants
through the focus trap passthrough list so they reach the handler.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
